execution_summary: Built Python 3.10 Docker image with pandas, numpy, statsmodels. Adapted run_replication.py: corrected dataset path, ensured consecutive indices, handled missing data, used integer group codes for MixedLM to avoid index error. Executed mixed-effects model on 33,520 accurate trials from 127 participants, testing preregistered three-way interaction. Model converged; focal interaction positive but not significant (p=.182), failing replication criterion.

code_executed.logs: Model converged; coefficient NFC_z:trial:rewardlevel = 0.0065, p=0.1817. Warnings: random effects covariance singular.

results.hypothesis_tested: Rewards will reduce switch-costs for low-NFC individuals but not for high-NFC individuals, operationalised as a positive NFC_z × trial × rewardlevel coefficient on logRT_z.

tables.table_description: Full MixedLM regression table printed by statsmodels.
